parsed_json.rationale: Stability addendum STAB-NRC-031 exactly matches the action boundary across all five required dimensions: lot NRC-31, maximum temperature ceiling of 12.0C (excursion of 11.8C is within limit), duration cap of 45 minutes (excursion of 42 minutes is within limit), NRC refrigerated reagent product family, and customer shipment release path; approval timestamp predates release.
